{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202284773E10F101DB0E50B94EC"}"},"total":47},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570697927215006488","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"崩铁写的太有意思了，虽然其他线太长影响观感，但我是读者啊，瓦塔西可以跳过哒[奸笑]
再说了免费的要求这么高干嘛，又不是啥大问题"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762692528,"group_id":"7557709984675400728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒蛋一个","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0guDjw+ts0jIRyNknZMTyw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec1151cdc15c4b9bb58fcfc243af58f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706626&x-signature=zqC70GQ2xc%2FJsBuhRSvAhRHMvPg%3D","user_id":"813281766804861","user_name":"錳星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"813281766804861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557709984675400728","book_info":{"abstract":"【同穿流】+【游戏】+【崩铁】+【博德之门3】+【升级流】+【轻松二次元】+【多女主（大概？）】+【不上列车的无名客】
被创死的白洛灵魂同时穿越诸天万界，但是只能共享记忆。
变形金刚白洛：“好生鸡肋的金手指，我还是想办法抢火种源吧。”
博德之门白洛·塔夫：“此言差矣！你看，是谁来了？”
一阵不明意义的激昂音乐响起！
崩铁白洛·穹：“很简单，我踏上记忆命途不就好了！”
说罢，他气息显露无疑，竟是开拓、记忆双命途行者！
只需要不断共享其他世界白洛的记忆，就相当于践行命途，简直是天选的开拓星神苗子啊！什么你问为啥不是记忆星神？当然是因为浮黎还活着啊！而阿基维利已经失踪了。那么不必成为开拓星神，我自超越开拓星神！
待到无限多元宇宙的众白洛合众为一，意念相通，俨然明白：“原来是超脱的我在收束自身可能性啊！那没事了！接着奏乐，接着舞！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od7c90ff4f2cc2d26536eb1e980b1c076~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不到一米六的废物","author_id":"","book_id":"7557709984675400728","book_name":"同时穿越但只共享记忆是什么鬼？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4380人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7557710075096220184","read_count":"4380","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"581305"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"173","tags":"动漫衍生,综漫,多女主,二次元,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od7c90ff4f2cc2d26536eb1e980b1c076~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301727&x-signature=UL5Bm6DBAoWOPjZVtnHpDiM04Ho%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1257496443100030","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202284773E10F101DB0E50B94EC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4071,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2373},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7595911288146051864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好的，目前看来，崩铁圈比较颠，趣味性很好，博德之门的两卷很经典的dnd味，特摄圈有点混乱，但只喜欢看特摄应该观感会不错，海虎的番外很优质，把力量融入整个地球让所有人都能觉醒磁场打造一个人人如龙的世界太劲了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768563880,"group_id":"7557709984675400728","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2263226002188427"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557709984675400728","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9226,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7574621978923664152","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"崩铁部分比较轻喜剧风格，其他部分倒是正经冒险风格，作者对不同风格的把控真不错，不同世界的故事都和那个世界对应"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763607309,"group_id":"7557709984675400728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5N/2xbpDkD7e4WJgJmuY3e+3hXleVLavnsnK6DC178M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2263226002188427","user_name":"想和素裳结婚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2263226002188427","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_i
